text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega's debut race is finally here. T.M.
Opera O and Meisho Doto are watching from the
stands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Top Road has come along as well, and the
cheering of the three classmates is heard
throughout the stands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega seems unfazed, completely locked
in on the race and her goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her heart pounds—the remaining trace of her late
sister trembles with excitement and anticipation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Promising to achieve victory to satisfy her sister,
Admire Vega dashes off, full of determination.
